meaning: n.家庭主义(指强调家庭和家属感情的社会结构形势)
examples: In the term of economics, so-called "Familism" is that family is as the basic unit to calculate costs and benefits.
Life event has not only a negative impact on deity, life and family belief, but only on familism by the interaction with philosophy orientation.
Once analyzing with familist approach, there would be tow important differences from individualist approach: (1) Familism regards life as being unlimited, while individualism regards life as limited;
